title: Trichinopoly Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Trichinopoly, with a Z-Score of +3.69. This extreme weather event has a critical score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 11.9 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 66%, and the wind speed is moderate at 14.2 km/h. 
 The city is experiencing a critical level of heat stress, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
